Lune
Lune is a conversational AI career tool that replaces the resume with a real 10-question conversation. No forms, no keyword boxes, no resume required.
What Lune does
    ∙    Asks 10 questions nobody else thought to ask
    ∙    Returns a summary of who you actually are professionally — not what your job title says
    ∙    Matches you to jobs based on who you actually are, not keywords
    ∙    Builds a living record of your professional identity over time
Who Lune is for
People whose experience doesn’t translate on paper — career changers, burned out workers, people with non-linear paths, caregivers re-entering the workforce, military veterans, anyone who has been overlooked by traditional hiring systems.
How it works
The conversation is always free. No resume required. No signup required to start.
Where to find Lune
https://www.trylune.app
